reviews.author: Siva Krishna Kota
reviews.review_body: One of the best cbse schools in the vicinity with affordable fees n quality education. Teachers are very experienced. Getting admission is very tough here. Transport facility is available. Campus is very big n spacious…

reviews.author: Ankita Mondal
reviews.review_body:
My daughter is studying here, We personally like it. Its Affordable,good atmosphere, location is good. Huge space and safe.
No hidden charges.
Old school methodology which we like.
I heard 10th and 12th results are good.
Timing for everyone is same 8:45 to 3:15
They have 2 weeks of Dussehera holiday instead of winter days holiday.

Cons:
Extra curriculum is not much.

Note: Dont compare with international school.

reviews.author: Surendranath Mondreti
reviews.review_body:
Joined my kid in UKG in the year 2022, now studying 1st class in the same school. Let's get to the point
Pros:
1. Affordable fees compared to other pvt schools
2. Approachable teachers

Cons:
1. No extra curricular activities. Similar schools have plenty of extra curricular activities for kids especially in lower classes
2. Too much intake of students - they literally use every nook n corner of the building to accommodate as many students as possible. Imagine for 1st class they have 8 or 9 sections with 40 in each
3. The students to school premises ratio is pathetic - though the school is big, it definitely can't do jusitce to the 2000> students, hence expect little to very less physical activities or games

Verdict - these guys just play quantity to sell with less margins compared to other schools (like dmart) to increase their revenue. if you can afford 20-25 k more per anum, suggest you to look at other schools in Kondapur as well. I personally decided to move my kid to a different school next year which focuses on all round growth at least reasonably okayish.

Advice to mgmt - give some breathing space to kids, don't try to oversell your brand, will harm in the long run

reviews.author: menavika nandan
reviews.review_body: Great school, beautiful surroundings but I found one flaw. Don’t ever force your ideology onto  children. One hour of mandatory mediation every morning is not a good idea. People, even kids, must always remember they have free will. If they don’t want to mediate, don’t get offended. Let them live on their own terms. It’s a school not a correctional facility.

reviews.author: Praphulla Chandra
reviews.review_body:
MVM is one of the best schools in and around Kondapur.
Pros: 1. MVM has branches across India 2. They follow CBSE curriculum and stick to the schedule 3. Spacious campus and class rooms 4. Meditation and Yoga 5. Approachable staff 6. Well established school
Cons: 1. High transportation fee 2. Can add more extra curricular activities as a part of schooling
